prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of HD stock, the 3-day prediction uses an annualized volatility of approximately 25% which translates to roughly 1.4% daily standard deviation. The point estimate assumes minimal drift over the short 3-day period. Confidence intervals are calculated using normal distribution assumptions with increasing width for higher confidence levels, accounting for the compounding uncertainty over the 3-day forecast horizon.
